languages.original_text: "Interesting choice for a contest. Very unorthodox for people who consider themselves descendants of a penal regiment."

languages.text: "Интересный выбор для состязания. Очень нестандартный для людей, которые считают себя потомками штрафного полка".
languages.translation_comment: A Rogue Trader proves his honesty to a smart man from the frontier world. A tough game of chess awaits

languages.text: 「コンテストの面白い選択ですね。刑務連隊の末裔だと自称する人にとっては、非常に異端な選択です」
languages.original_text: "Interesting choice for a contest. Very unorthodox for people who consider themselves descendants of a penal regiment."

traits.locale_text: 「コンテストの面白い選択ですね。刑務連隊の末裔だと自称する人にとっては、非常に異端な選択です」

languages.text: « Un choix intéressant pour un concours, et très étonnant pour des gens qui se considèrent comme les descendants d'un régiment pénal. »
languages.original_text: "Interesting choice for a contest. Very unorthodox for people who consider themselves descendants of a penal regiment."

traits.locale_text: « Un choix intéressant pour un concours, et très étonnant pour des gens qui se considèrent comme les descendants d'un régiment pénal. »

languages.text: "Interessante Wahl für einen Wettstreit. Sehr unorthodox für Leute, die sich als Nachkommen eines Strafregiments betrachten."
languages.original_text: "Interesting choice for a contest. Very unorthodox for people who consider themselves descendants of a penal regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Interessante Wahl für einen Wettstreit. Sehr unorthodox für Leute, die sich als Nachkommen eines Strafregiments betrachten."

languages.text: "İlginç bir seçim. Kendilerini bir ceza infaz alayının torunları olarak gören insanlar için oldukça sıra dışı."
languages.original_text: "Interesting choice for a contest. Very unorthodox for people who consider themselves descendants of a penal regiment."

traits.locale_text: "İlginç bir seçim. Kendilerini bir ceza infaz alayının torunları olarak gören insanlar için oldukça sıra dışı."

languages.text: «Una elección interesante como prueba. Muy poco ortodoxa, para tratarse de gente que se considera descendiente de un regimiento penal».
languages.original_text: "Interesting choice for a contest. Very unorthodox for people who consider themselves descendants of a penal regiment."

traits.locale_text: «Una elección interesante como prueba. Muy poco ortodoxa, para tratarse de gente que se considera descendiente de un regimiento penal».

languages.text: “有趣的较量方式。对于自认为是判罪军团后裔的人来说，这非常不合正统。”
languages.original_text: "Interesting choice for a contest. Very unorthodox for people who consider themselves descendants of a penal regiment."
